chapter_voice_summary: BG 2.13's voice modulates from the doctrinal exposition of 2.12 into the analogical demonstration register — Krishna gives the first formal proof. The engineering layer (the principal engineer's note to the v4 team) matches this register: instructional but not consoling, precise about what survives and what doesn't. Voice is consistent with the chapter's didactic-corrective arc; the engineering layer's tone of 'orienting rather than discouraging' (the new team experiences the note as showing them where identity lives) preserves the chapter's pedagogical voice.
